evals.name: procurement-check-with-uvo-links
evals.prompt: Over verejne obstaravanie pre SLOVNAFT, a.s. (ICO 31322832). Maju viacero veľkych zmluv v CRZ. Chcem vediet ci presli riadnym obstaravanim a kolko ponuk bolo v sutazi.
evals.expected_output: Procurement report for SLOVNAFT showing contracts with existing UVO links, contracts without procurement, and zlte stopy evaluation

assertions.name: queries_crz_for_uvo_links
assertions.check: Agent queries the zmluvy table to find contracts with existing uvo_url for ICO 31322832

assertions.name: finds_existing_uvo_urls
assertions.check: Agent identifies that SLOVNAFT has contracts with existing UVO links (at least 3 — some via uvo.gov.sk, some via josephine.proebiz.com)

assertions.name: checks_contracts_without_uvo
assertions.check: Agent also queries for large contracts WITHOUT uvo_url to identify potential procurement gaps

assertions.name: follows_output_template
assertions.check: Output includes summary section (contracts with/without UVO), per-contract sections with CRZ data table, and zlte stopy evaluation

assertions.name: assesses_procurement_risk
assertions.check: Agent provides a procurement risk assessment — notes that having UVO links is positive, or flags contracts that lack procurement

evals.name: procurement-check-no-uvo-links
evals.prompt: Firma STRABAG s.r.o. (ICO 17317282) ma zmluvy za skoro 10 milionov EUR v CRZ. Over ci presli verejnym obstaravanim.
evals.expected_output: Procurement report for STRABAG showing that large contracts lack UVO links, flagging procurement gaps

assertions.name: queries_crz_for_uvo_links
assertions.check: Agent queries zmluvy table for ICO 17317282 to check for existing uvo_url values

assertions.name: identifies_missing_procurement
assertions.check: Agent identifies that STRABAG has large contracts (>50K EUR) without UVO links and flags this

assertions.name: flags_no_uvo_record
assertions.check: Agent raises a no_uvo_record or equivalent zlta stopa for contracts exceeding procurement thresholds without UVO links

assertions.name: lists_specific_contracts
assertions.check: Agent lists at least 2 specific STRABAG contracts with their values that lack procurement records

evals.name: procurement-mixed-supplier
evals.prompt: Swietelsky-Slovakia spol. s r.o. (ICO 00896225) - stavebna firma s 8 zmluvami v CRZ za celkovo 9.5M EUR. Niektore zmluvy maju UVO odkaz, ine nie. Zisti stav obstaravania pre vsetky ich vyznamne kontrakty.
evals.expected_output: Mixed procurement report showing some contracts with UVO links (competition verified) and others without, with risk assessment

assertions.name: finds_contracts_with_uvo
assertions.check: Agent finds Swietelsky contracts that have uvo_url populated (parking Osuského, chodník Draždiak, etc.)

assertions.name: finds_contracts_without_uvo
assertions.check: Agent finds Swietelsky contracts >50K EUR that lack uvo_url (cyklotrasa, zmluva o dielo 1.76M, etc.)

assertions.name: uses_db_first_strategy
assertions.check: Agent checks the CRZ database first for existing UVO links before attempting browser automation

assertions.name: provides_summary_counts
assertions.check: Output includes summary showing how many contracts have vs lack UVO links (approximately 3 with, several without)

assertions.name: evaluates_zlte_stopy
assertions.check: Agent evaluates procurement zlte stopy — at minimum flags large contracts without UVO records
